text: The world feels angular and slightly disorienting, as if reality itself has tilted. I sense quietness, perhaps even anticipation, in the sterile expanse of the hallway. Yet, turning towards the vibrant, informative wall display about R+D, I feel curiosity stirring. The contrast between emptiness and the burst of information before me makes me ponder the boundaries between innovation and isolation. I feel intellectually awake, yet strangely out of place, as though I've wandered between the spaces of thought and practice.
